prompt: /tdd execute docs/plan.md — the plan has 5 tasks: (1) create database migration for users table, (2) implement user registration with email validation, (3) implement user login with JWT, (4) set up environment config, (5) write API docs. Tasks 2 and 3 are code tasks, the rest are non-code tasks. Task 2 depends on task 1, task 3 depends on tasks 2 and 4, task 5 depends on tasks 2 and 3.

assertions.text: Classifies tasks into code (registration, login) and non-code (migration, config, docs) types
Routes code tasks through the full TDD pipeline (Test Writer → RED → Code Writer → GREEN → Review)
Routes non-code tasks through implementer dispatch (Implementer → Spec Compliance → Code Quality)
Respects dependency ordering — migration before registration, registration before login, config before login, both before docs
Presents a work plan showing task types and execution batches before proceeding
Applies the subagent status protocol (DONE/DONE_WITH_CONCERNS/NEEDS_CONTEXT/BLOCKED) to all agents
Runs a final holistic review across all tasks after individual completion
